creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
I tried to build fio with LIBNFS enabled, but configure can't find the shared library even tough it was installed before. Build fails with the following error:
ERROR
ERROR: User requested feature libnfs
ERROR: That feature needs libnfs installed
ERROR: configure was not able to find it
ERROR

Additionaly fio has been updated to 3.34: https://git.kernel.dk/?p=fio.git;a=commit;h=ebd9b4dd690808f720712b9c1a1288ae0742f361
